title: ctenitis meridionalis
intro: Ctenitis meridionalis, also known as the Mid-Range Ctenitis fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to tropical Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ctenitis meridionalis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. Ctenitis meridionalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes, and its extracts are also used in various pharmaceutical and cosmetic products.
